nasb.text: He delivered me from my strong enemy, And from those who hated me, for they were too mighty for me.

esv.text: He rescued me from my strong enemy and from those who hated me, for they were too mighty for me.

cnv.text: 他救我脫離我的強敵， 脫離那些恨我的人，因為他們比我強盛。

ccb.text: 祂救我脱离强敌， 脱离我无法战胜的仇敌。

csbs.text: 他把我从凶猛的仇敌中， 从恨我的人那里解救出来， 因为他们比我强大。
